## Analyzers (2)

### Enrich observables with intelligence

#### [Mnemonic pDNS Public v3.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/MnemonicPDNS)
Query IP addresses and domains against Mnemonic pDNS public service.

- **Author:** Michael Stensrud, Nordic Financial CERT
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `ip`, `domain`

#### [Mnemonic pDNS Closed v3.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/MnemonicPDNS)
Query IP addresses and domains against Mnemonic pDNS restricted service.

- **Author:** Michael Stensrud, Nordic Financial CERT
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `ip`, `domain`
